ORDER FOR EXAMINATION AS TO AMY GREENBERG KOVAL ON JUL-02-2019 - OFF CALENDAR. PARAGRAPH 1 OF THE OEX LISTS AMY GREENBERG KOVAL AS INDIVDUAL TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION. THIS IS A CLERICAL ERROR ON THE PART OF PLAINTIFF ADVANCE RESTAURANT FINANCE, LLC. CORRECT EXAMINEE IS DEFENDANT MARTHA ARGUELLO, DBA CAFE ARGUELLO. THIS WAS EXPLAINED TO PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL BY THE CLERK IN D514 ON 7/2/19. COUNSEL SHALL PREPARE A NEW ORDER TO APPEAR FOR EXAMINATION. NO APPEARANCE. NOT REPORTED. JUDGE: GAIL DEKREON. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514).
